M1024_PMT_DGNS_ICD_F3_CD M1024 (M0246) Case Mix Dx- Secndry ICD5, Col3 This field lists the case mix fifth secondary diagnosis (ICD-9), column 3. CHAR 7 x
M1024_PMT_DGNS_ICD_F4_CD M1024 (M0246) Case Mix Dx- Secndry ICD5, Col4 This field lists the case mix fifth secondary diagnosis (ICD-9), column 4. CHAR 7 x
M1030_THH_ENT_NUTR M1030 (M0250) Therapies in Home- Enteral Nutrition This field is checked if the patient receives enteral nutrition therapy at home.
